user_prompt: Triage this ticket: 'My account got charged twice this month, please refund the duplicate.'
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH
Category: Billing - Duplicate Charge

Draft response:

Hi there,

I am very sorry to hear that you’ve been charged twice this month. I completely understand how concerning that is, and I want to get this sorted out for you immediately.

I am currently looking into your billing history to identify the duplicate transaction. 

1. Could you please provide the last four digits of the card used and the date of the charges?
2. Once I confirm the duplicate, I will initiate a refund for that amount right away.

I'll update you as soon as I have more information from our billing system. Thank you for your patience while I resolve this.

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to triage the ticket and draft a professional, empathetic response for the customer.
